taskDefinition.description: The family and revision or full ARN of the task definition to run.

cluster.description: The short name or full ARN of the cluster to run the task on.

count.description: The number of instantiations of the specified task to place on your cluster (1-10).

launchType.description: The launch type on which to run your task.

platformVersion.description: The platform version the task uses (Fargate launch type only).

group.description: The name of the task group to associate with the task.

startedBy.description: An optional tag specified when a task is started.

enableExecuteCommand.description: Whether to enable Amazon ECS Exec for the task.

clientToken.description: An identifier you provide to ensure the idempotency of the request.
